library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Medical recipes and remedies in Ladino from an extensive chain of joins that suggest the existence of a broader compilation. On the recto there are ingredients and/or components such as a "wick / קאנדיל" (l. 5r) and below that there is mention of "pearl" and "coral" (l. 8r). On the verso, one entry is dedicated "para kurar la kabesa / for curing the head" and "sesame oil / טאחינה" may be in use. Further down on the verso, olive oil is also mentioned as an ingredient. MCD.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בLadino. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
